00030 #ifndef _MIPS_ELF_H_
00031 #define _MIPS_ELF_H_
00032 
00033 /*
00034  * MIPS machine-dependent definitions for the ELF binary format.
00035  */
00036 
00037 
00038 /* The ELF executable type. */
00039 #define EM_MACHINE  EM_MIPS
00040 
00041 /* Linker relocation codes.        SIZE   DESCRIPTION */
00042 #define R_MIPS_NONE     0       /* ---    nop */
00043 #define R_MIPS_16       1       /* u16    value */
00044 #define R_MIPS_32       2       /* u32    value */
00045 #define R_MIPS_REL32    3       /* u32    value relative to patched address */
00046 #define R_MIPS_26       4       /* u26    j/jal instruction address field */
00047 #define R_MIPS_HI16     5       /* u16    %hi(sym) as below */
00048 #define R_MIPS_LO16     6       /* s16    %lo(sym) as below */
00049 #define R_MIPS_GPREL16  7       /* s16    offset from GP register */
00050 #define R_MIPS_LITERAL  8       /* s16    GPREL16 for file-local symbols (?) */
00051 #define R_MIPS_GOT16    9       /* u16    offset into global offset table */
00052 #define R_MIPS_PC16     10      /* s16    PC-relative reference */
00053 #define R_MIPS_CALL16   11      /* u16    call through global offset table */
00054 #define R_MIPS_GPREL32  12      /* s32    offset from GP register */
00055 /* %hi/%lo are defined so %hi(sym) << 16 + %lo(sym) = sym */
00056 
00057 
00058 #endif /* _MIPS_ELF_H_ */
